_meta.resume_note: Pinned to LTCC's official 2025-2026 eLumen catalog. The complete Programs and Associate Degrees for Transfer indexes contain no Biology program or award, so none_found remains supported for this academic year.

notes: The official 2025-2026 catalog contains no Biology program grouping and no Biology award in its complete ADT index. Its closest broad science option is Liberal Arts: Mathematics and Science AA, and Environmental Science - AS is specialized; both remain out of scope.
